description: Production-grade release with enhanced security, comprehensive cache clearing, and server-side configuration
changelog: Version 2.0.0 - Enhanced XSS protection with input sanitization
Version 2.0.0 - Race condition protection for concurrent checks
Version 2.0.0 - Comprehensive cache clearing (all storage types)
Version 2.0.0 - Memory leak prevention with event listener cleanup
Version 2.0.0 - Enhanced version comparison with semver support
Version 2.0.0 - Timeout protection and abort controller
Version 2.0.0 - Server-side cache configuration guide added
Version 2.0.0 - Security documentation and best practices
Version 2.0.0 - Build script with atomic writes and validation
